ccpm-scheduler — iteration-3 review

Each eval below shows the input data, the CCPM schedule produced with the skill, and a deliberately naive traditional-CPM baseline (safe durations, no resource leveling, no buffers, calendars ignored) rendered by the same chart script. Scroll to compare. Generated 2026-07-02.

website-launchlab-trialskitchen-renovationequipment-retrofit

website-launch

Build a CCPM schedule for the website relaunch (tasks.csv safe estimates, resources.csv, calendar.csv availability: dev out days 10-13, editor out days 0-5).

tasks.csv

idnameduration_safepredecessor_idsresource_idsurl

CCPM schedule (with skill)

9/9 checks passed
  • ✓ schedule.csv parses — parsed 12 rows
  • ✓ CCPM: zero overloaded resource-days (leveling worked) — 0 overloaded resource-days
  • ✓ CCPM: exactly one project buffer ending the schedule — 1 PB(s), end 40 vs 40
  • ✓ CCPM: feeding buffer(s) protect non-critical chains — 2 feeding buffer(s)
  • ✓ CCPM: buffers attached via :PB/:FB link types — PB=W9:PB; FB1=W3:FB; FB2=W7:FB
  • ✓ CCPM: project buffer ~50% of critical chain — PB=12, CC=23
  • ✓ CCPM: calendar respected (no work on unavailable days) — 0 day(s) of work during resource outages
  • ✓ CCPM: url column passes through to schedule.csv — 9/9 tasks carry a url
  • ✓ gantt.png exists and is a valid PNG — ok

website-launch — CCPM schedule

  • Critical chain: W5 Build backend → W4 Build frontend → W6 Integrate → W8 Load content → W9 Launch QA
  • Critical chain length: 23 working days (work finishes day 28)
  • Project buffer: 12 days → promised completion: day 40
Feeding bufferProtectsSize (days)Anchored to
FB1W3 Design mockups2start of W4 Build frontend
FB2W1 Content outline → W2 Draft copy → W7 Edit copy6start of W8 Load content

Resource availability from calendar.csv is honored: tasks are placed contiguously around outage windows (grey blocks in the Gantt utilization panel), never split across them.

Durations are aggressive estimates; overruns are expected roughly half the time and consume buffer — the promise date only moves if a buffer runs dry. Work the critical chain relay-runner style: hand off immediately, no multitasking.
